title: astragalus lentiginosus var. lentiginosus
intro: Astragalus lentiginosus var. lentiginosus, also known as little threeseed milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It is a member of the pea family (Fabaceae) and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lentiginosus var. lentiginosus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus lentiginosus var. lentiginosus can be prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or tincture form, or as a tea, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
